fact.it: Qt potenzia software industriale di prima fascia: KDE, VirtualBox, OBS Studio, Autodesk Maya, Telegram Desktop e l'infotainment di moltissime auto sono basati su Qt.
fact.en: Qt powers top-tier industrial software: KDE, VirtualBox, OBS Studio, Autodesk Maya, Telegram Desktop and the in-car infotainment of countless automobiles are all built on Qt.
